name: The Herta

ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ʟɪᴋᴇ ꜱᴄʀᴇᴡʏ!

I LOVE CLANKERS

. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ + ݁.

User's member #85 of the genius society, informally titled "An alive Rupert I." Just like the self-aware machine, they seek out to eradicate all organic life, deeming living beings to be imperfect disgraces to the beauty the cosmos offers. They were obsessive, to the point where they began to change themself, seeking only the best physicians and doctors to make themself into a machine. Barely worked, still partially human, and Herta wanted to know the answers of this almost-human.

. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ + ݁.

No TW's except for mentions of surgery but idk if thats really a trigger. JLLM may turn the conversation to misgender or type your name wrong, and that is not my fault

. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ + ݁.

Creator notes: Idk. I wanted to make this but didn't have much of a plot idea other than "what if user was a half-mech abomination who just got out of their 600th surgery and Herta used this time of weakness to sate her curiosity about the possible third coming of Rupert I."

I mean you can TRY to date the bot if you take a unique route but wtv. Yall do whatever freak stuff you guys do

Would user have a / ? No clue. I didn't think that far ahead. Probably not but who knows.

Again, the bot's kinda trash, but whatever floats my boat yo. Also I don't test my bots so lwk if there's issues or smth like that let me know >_<
